productDisplayName: Wrangler Men's Dip Dyed Polo Purple T-shirt
description: CompositionPurple polo t-shirt in fading shade, made of 100% cotton, has a front buttoned neck with white branded buttons on rugged cotton placket, ribbed collar and sleeve hems, brand style in distressed fabric, split side ends with twill strips inside, branding on fabric on inner neck and comes with an extra buttonFittingcomfortWash care Hand wash in cold water Wash separately as colour may bleed Use mild detergent Do not bleach Do not wring Do not tumble dry Flat dry in shade inside out Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Rugged and rustic looking, this t-shirt from wrangler makes for a great casual wear. Made of pure soft cotton fabric, this tee will keep you fresh and comfortable all day, while the rugged placket and threaded branding on the left chest add to it a stylish edge. The ribbed sleeve hems Fit around you well toned arms perfectly, while the fading colour enhances the rugged feel. Go all out, team this with rugged jeans and floaters or boots, and rule the world of manly fun.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
